channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: CSIS Announces Joseph F. Dunford as Next CEO
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies today announced that retired General Joseph F. Dunford, who served as the 19th chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, has been named its next chief executive officer.

item.title: Nepal’s Election Marks a Generational Break—and a New Strategic Moment in the Himalayas
item.description: Nepal’s election signals more than a political upset. Balendra “Balen” Shah’s youth-driven victory marks a generational break in Kathmandu and could reshape how India, China, and the United States navigate a new strategic moment in the Himalayas.
